meaning: n.百合,百合花,洁白的东西,纯洁的人adj.洁白的,纯洁的 Lily 莉莉(女子名)
examples: Lily lives in a penthouse just off Park Avenue.
I have just lent it to Lily.
What was Lily doing yesterday evening?
Obama points out that Romney refused to express support for the Lily Ledbetter Act.
Lily-Mae's parents are both professional ballet dancers and they were delighted at the choice of song.
